_meta.description: Carta Social concelho-name aliases → our canonical concelhoSlug. The scraper mapper consults this before falling back to slugify(). Used to normalize Açores/Madeira variants and accent / hyphen quirks (e.g. 'Vila Nova de Gaia' vs 'vila-nova-de-gaia', 'Calheta (Madeira)' vs 'calheta-madeira').
